slug_taken: This identifier is already in use
last_admin: A project must keep at least one admin
slug_mismatch: The YAML slug must match the template
scenario_mismatch: The YAML scenario must match the template
template_unpublished: This task type has no published template
no_models_granted: No models are granted to this project
model_unresolvable: No granted model satisfies a required role
provider_credential_required: This provider requires a project credential — add one in project settings
provider_exists: This provider already has a credential — rotate or remove it
skill_unregistered: A required skill is not registered
skill_not_granted: A required skill is not granted to this project
mcp_unregistered: A required MCP server is not registered
mcp_not_granted: A required MCP server is not granted to this project
run_active: The latest run has not finished
already_decided: This approval has already been decided
registration_closed: Self-registration is disabled; ask an administrator for an invite
invite_invalid: This invite is invalid or revoked
invite_already_accepted: This invite has already been used
contract_violation: An agent output violated its contract
workspace_lost: The run's workspace is no longer on this worker host
